title: Phase II Study of DrugX in Adult Hypertension

sections.objectives: To evaluate the efficacy of DrugX in reducing systolic blood pressure in adults
sections.inclusion_criteria: Adults aged 18-65 with systolic BP greater than 140mmHg and no prior cardiac surgery
sections.exclusion_criteria: Pregnant women, patients with renal failure, patients under 18
sections.adverse_event_reporting: All Grade 3 and above events must be reported within 24 hours to the safety board

unsafe_dosages.violation: DrugX daily dose of 1700mg exceeds WHO maximum of 500mg

contradictions.description: Exclusion criteria says patients under 18 are excluded but inclusion criteria does not specify a minimum age clearly
